=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 4/20/03, Austin, Texas, The Backyard, 2CDR

Lineage and taper: unknown. Same digipop described for the bw recording:d1t2 4:08
Very good sound 

CD1

1 Watching The River Flow (Bob on piano), 2 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 3 Tonight I'll Be Staying Here With You (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel), 4 Tombstone Blues (Bob on harp and piano), 5 You Ain't Goin' Nowhere (Bob on harp and piano, Larry on pedal steel), 6 Moonlight (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 7 Cold Irons Bound, 8 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic) (Freddie on violin), 9 Dignity (Bob on harp and piano), 10 Love Sick (Bob on piano),

CD2

1 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 2 Floater (Too Much To Ask) (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass, Freddie on violin), 3 Standing In The Doorway (Bob on piano), 4 Summer Days (Bob on harp and piano, Tony on standup bass), 5 (encore), Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 6 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano) 



Concert # 1504 of The Never-Ending Tour. Third concert of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 14.

Third concert with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Receli (drums & percussion).

1-6, 9-16 Bob Dylan (piano).
3, 5 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
6 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
7, 8 Bob Dylan (guitar).
8 acoustic with the band.
8, 12 Freddie Koella (violin).
11 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).

 

10 new songs (62%) compared to previous concert. 8 new songs for this tour.

 

Stereo audience recording, 110 minutes.
